description_long: This object consists of two adjacent brick apartment buildings, each with a steeply pitched dark gray roof and a single chimney. The facades are characterized by large, symmetrically arranged windows with dark frames, and each building features a single wooden entrance door at street level. The brickwork is detailed and uniform, with subtle stone accents at the base and around the windows, giving the buildings a classic European urban appearance. The rear and side walls are plain brick with no windows, emphasizing the front-facing orientation. The roofs have dormer windows and small vent structures, adding architectural interest and suggesting attic spaces. The overall design is compact and vertical, suitable for dense urban neighborhoods.
description: Two adjacent brick apartment buildings with steep gray roofs, large symmetrical windows, and single wooden doors, featuring classic European urban styling.
description_view_0: Front view showing both buildings' facades with large windows, wooden doors, and detailed brickwork.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying plain brick walls, chimneys, and the pitched roofs with minimal architectural features.
description_view_2: Alternate front view with both buildings' facades visible, highlighting the symmetry and window arrangement.
description_view_3: Side view showing the plain brick side walls and the full length of the pitched roofs.
attribute_window_arrangement: The windows are symmetrically arranged in vertical columns across the front facades, with even spacing and alignment on each floor, creating a balanced and orderly appearance.
